privileged_info_summary: The source document psa_draft.docx is synthetically generated from a python-docx script embedded in setup_task.sh. It contains exactly 9 section headings as claimed (Definitions, Scope of Services, Fees and Payment, Intellectual Property, Confidentiality, Representations and Warranties, Limitation of Liability, Indemnification, General Provisions). The title text is 'PROFESSIONAL SERVICES AGREEMENT'. However, the source document has only 5 defined terms in the Definitions section matching the task criteria (terms in quotes followed by 'means'): Services, Deliverables, Confidential Information, Intellectual Property Rights, and Force Majeure Event. 'Effective Date' is referenced in the preamble but not formally defined in the Definitions section. The metadata claim of 6 defined terms is contradicted. Additionally, the metadata claims the footer_fragment_left should be 'Meridian Legal Partners', but the actual task requirement specifies 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Legal Partners LLP' (missing 'CONFIDENTIAL' prefix, em dash, and 'LLP' suffix in metadata). The footer should contain an auto-updating page number field.
